name_cn:

New Arrival🅰️🅰️ [Detail Photos]
Ava shoulder bag Large Logo Monogram Brown new arrival~ High-appeal vintage literary vibe~ It hits the spot directly. Really super nice! The shoulder bag shape is vintage, cool, and a bit cute. Exquisite and petite♡ Vintage and stylish, practical and easy to match💯 Can be carried as a handbag or over the shoulder.
Style No.: 114493 Nude
Size: 23 x13.5 x6cm (with original packaging)
